mapper.select:
SELECT me.event_id, me.created_at, me.event_type, me.severity, me.event_code, me.title, me.request_uri, me.client_ip, me.user_id, u.email AS email, me.trace_id, me.source_class, me.resolved_yn, me.resolved_at, me.resolved_by
ORDER BY me.created_at DESC, me.event_id DESC LIMIT #{request.offset}, #{request.size}

SELECT me.event_id, me.created_at, me.event_type, me.severity, me.event_code, me.title, me.request_uri, me.client_ip, me.user_id, me.trace_id, me.source_class, me.resolved_yn, me.resolved_at, me.resolved_by, me.message, me.detail_json, me.http_method, me.query_string, me.user_agent, me.exception_class, me.exception_message, me.stack_trace, me.source_method, me.updated_at FROM tb_monitoring_event me WHERE me.event_id = #{eventId}

SELECT me.event_id, me.created_at, me.event_type, me.severity, me.event_code, me.title, me.request_uri, me.client_ip, me.user_id, me.trace_id, me.source_class, me.resolved_yn, me.resolved_at, me.resolved_by, me.message, me.detail_json, me.http_method, me.query_string, me.user_agent, me.exception_class, me.exception_message, me.stack_trace, me.source_method, me.updated_at FROM tb_monitoring_event me WHERE me.title = #{title} AND me.message = #{message} AND me.event_id <> #{excludeEventId} ORDER BY me.created_at DESC, me.event_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT me.event_id, me.resolved_yn, me.resolved_at, me.resolved_by FROM tb_monitoring_event me WHERE me.event_id IN
#{eventId}
